recommendations.title: Miss Hokusai
recommendations.overview: A daughter is constantly overshadowed by her famous father, but she is determined to make her own mark in the world.

recommendations.title: Colorful

recommendations.title: Las leyendas: El origen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Adventure, Family, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a human baby crosses the Eternal Mirror, the portal between the living and the dead opens its path to the beings from the underworld.

recommendations.title: Balto
recommendations.overview: An outcast half-wolf risks his life to prevent a deadly epidemic from ravaging Nome, Alaska.

recommendations.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
recommendations.overview: In a brutal war between devils, hunters, and secret enemies, a mysterious girl named Reze has stepped into Denji's world, and he faces his deadliest battle yet, fueled by love in a world where survival knows no rules.

recommendations.title: Being John Malkovich
recommendations.overview: One day at work, unsuccessful puppeteer Craig finds a portal into the head of actor John Malkovich. The portal soon becomes a passion for anybody who enters its mad and controlling world of overtaking another human body.

recommendations.title: Benji the Hunted
recommendations.overview: Benji has become stranded on a remote island after a boating accident. He finds himself struggling to survive in the wilderness, avoiding close encounters with a wolf, a bear, and a territorial female cougar with her cub.

recommendations.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Grudge of Edinburgh Part 2
recommendations.overview: Reunited with Lancelot for the first time since their tragic accident, Tristan must learn to conquer his inner demons in order to save his mother's life.
